seo.title: Angle Control - AI Multi-Angle Product and Character Images | OpenCreator
seo.description: Generate consistent angle variations from one image input. Use AI angle control to create front, side, and perspective views for ecommerce and creative production.

hero.title: Angle Control
hero.description: Start from one image and generate consistent new viewpoints in minutes. This workflow is ideal when you need clean front, side, and dynamic angle variations without rebuilding the subject from scratch.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload one product or character image

steps.title: Upload a base image
steps.description: Use a clear source image of your product or character to preserve shape, material, and key visual details.

steps.title: Set target viewpoints
steps.description: Choose the camera angles you need, such as front, side, top-down, or perspective hero views.

steps.title: Run angle generation
steps.description: The angle-control node creates new viewpoints while keeping identity and styling aligned with the original input.

steps.title: Export for listings and creative use
steps.description: Download your angle set and reuse it for ecommerce pages, social posts, ad mockups, and design reviews.

items.question: What is Angle Control?
items.answer: Angle Control is an image workflow that generates new camera viewpoints from a single input image while keeping the subject visually consistent.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: You only need one clear source image. Higher-quality input usually gives more stable angle variations.

items.question: Can I generate multiple angles in one run?
items.answer: Yes. You can iterate quickly and produce a set of front, side, and perspective outputs for different channels.

items.question: Will product details stay consistent?
items.answer: The workflow is designed to preserve identity, color, and material cues. For best results, use sharp source images with clear edges.

items.question: Is this useful for ecommerce catalogs?
items.answer: Absolutely. Multi-angle visuals can improve product understanding on listing pages and reduce manual shoot requirements.

items.question: Can I use it for characters as well as products?
items.answer: Yes. It works for both objects and character-style inputs when the source image has clear structure and lighting.

webPage.name: Angle Control
